Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-09 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data reveals two starkly different momentum profiles at the top of the rankings. CLMT dominates at rank 1 with an exceptional 91.6 score, driven by extraordinary 5-year returns of 595.86% and 1-year outperformance versus SPY of 126.23 percentage points, though this momentum appears concentrated in the medium term (the 10-year return of 211.74% significantly lags the 5-year, and it underperforms SPY by 34.15% over a decade). PHYS ranks second with a more balanced but modest momentum profile: 5-year returns of 180.67% with all five ratio thresholds passing (compared to CLMT's three), suggesting steadier growth across timeframes, plus positive 10-year outperformance versus SPY of 32.62%. The contrast highlights a market split between spectacular recent momentum plays (CLMT) and slower but more durable long-term gainers (PHYS), with CLMT's negative long-term relative performance to SPY and QQQ warranting attention given its "strong_buy" signal.
